meaning: vt.使活跃,给予精力,加强,给与...电压vi.用力,活动
examples: He helped energize and mobilize millions of people around the nation.
This will energize your entire body.
Energize for the day ahead at Lou Mitchell's (565 W Jackson Blvd) near Union Station.
Will tax and regulatory policy energize or douse the people's will to invest and innovate?
